---
id: handle-list-user-orgs
title: "List user organizations"
description: "Returns all organizations the authenticated user belongs to, including their role in each org and the org's current billing tier. Also returns the active org_id from the current session"
sidebar_label: "List user organizations"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "get api-method"
info_path: docs/rushomon-url-shortener-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"List user organizations"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/api/orgs"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Returns all organizations the authenticated user belongs to, including their role in each org and the org's current billing tier. Also returns the active org_id from the current session

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={undefined}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>
